recommendations.title: A Friendly Tale...
recommendations.overview: Lea and her husband Marc have known Francis and his wife Karine for a very long time.  Over the years, each one of them has been assigned a specific role.  The balance and dynamic of the group is blown up when Lea decides to write a novel, which turn

recommendations.title: Le Chef
recommendations.overview: A veteran chef faces off against his restaurant group's new CEO, who wants to the establishment to lose a star from its rating in order to bring in a younger chef who specializes in molecular gastronomy.

recommendations.title: The Rabbi's Cat
recommendations.overview: The story of a rabbi and his talking cat, a sharp-tongued feline philosopher brimming with scathing humor and a less than pure love for the rabbi's teenage daughter.

recommendations.title: Coco
recommendations.overview: Coco is a French comedy released in 2009 and produced by Gad Elmaleh. This is the first embodiment of the actor, adapted from a sketch in the show La Vie Normale. Coco talks about organizing a Bar Mitzvah.

recommendations.title: Onward
recommendations.overview: In a suburban fantasy world, two teenage elf brothers embark on an extraordinary quest to discover if there is still a little magic left out there.

recommendations.title: The Magnificent Seven
recommendations.overview: An oppressed Mexican peasant village hires seven gunfighters to help defend their homes.

recommendations.title: The Science of Sleep
recommendations.overview: A man entranced by his dreams and imagination is lovestruck with a French woman and feels he can show her his world.

recommendations.title: The Illusionist
recommendations.overview: A French illusionist travels to Scotland to work. He meets a young woman in a small village. Their ensuing adventure in Edinburgh changes both their lives forever.

recommendations.title: Wonka
recommendations.overview: Willy Wonka – chock-full of ideas and determined to change the world one delectable bite at a time – is proof that the best things in life begin with a dream, and if you’re lucky enough to meet Willy Wonka, anything is possible.

recommendations.title: A Crime in Paradise
recommendations.overview: In the 1980 French countryside, farmer Jojo and his ill-tempered wife Lulu hate each other, though their respective interests speak against divorce. The only thing that keeps the oppressed Jojo from murder is the threat of the guillotine...
